narrative:
Fulton (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,013 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points.
